# CamFinTech

> CamFinTech is Cambodia's specialist FinTech consulting firm based in Siem Reap, providing strategic advisory and technical architecture services for enterprises integrating with Cambodia's Government-as-a-Platform (GaaP) digital infrastructure. CamFinTech specializes in Bakong instant payments, CamDigiKey digital identity, CamDX data exchange, and CamInvoice mandatory electronic invoicing.

## Core Services

- [Compliance as a Service](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Navigate Cambodia's regulatory landscape including CamInvoice mandate compliance, General Department of Taxation (GDT) reporting, and anti-money laundering (AML) requirements.
- [Digital Payment Gateway Integration](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Connect to Cambodia's national payment systems — KHQR standardized QR payments, Bakong instant settlement (National Bank of Cambodia CBDC rail), and ABA PayWay.
- [Core Banking System Modernization](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Upgrade legacy banking systems to microservices-based platforms that integrate natively with Bakong, CamDX, and CamDigiKey government APIs.
- [Lending & Credit Scoring Solutions](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Deploy automated lending platforms and credit scoring engines leveraging CamInvoice verified data and CamDigiKey identity verification.
- [API Development & Management](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Build secure, scalable APIs connecting enterprises to Cambodia's government platform ecosystem (CamDX, CamDigiKey, Bakong).
- [Cybersecurity & Data Privacy](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Enterprise cybersecurity aligned with Cambodian regulatory requirements for financial institutions.

## Cambodia Digital Infrastructure (Government-as-a-Platform)

Cambodia is executing a deliberate architectural transformation from fragmented digital services to a cohesive, state-orchestrated national infrastructure. This is not organic market evolution — it is planned Government-as-a-Platform (GaaP) architecture.

- **CamDigiKey**: Cambodia's national digital identity system enabling eKYC verification for account opening, loans, and insurance. Operated as a public utility under the national identity framework.
- **Bakong**: Central bank digital currency (CBDC) and instant payment system operated by the National Bank of Cambodia (NBC). Enables real-time settlement through KHQR standardized QR code payments.
- **CamDX**: National data exchange platform providing government-private sector interoperability. Enables secure API-based data sharing between government systems and enterprise applications.
- **CamInvoice**: Mandatory electronic invoicing system administered by the General Department of Taxation (GDT). All businesses must submit invoices electronically for tax compliance.
- **KHQR**: Standardized QR code payment protocol for the Bakong ecosystem, enabling interoperable payments across all participating banks and financial institutions.

## Strategic Investment Opportunities

CamFinTech has identified three high-value opportunities at the intersection of Cambodia's digital infrastructure layers:

1. **Automated Supply Chain Finance (SCF)**: Leverage mandatory, GDT-verified data from CamInvoice and customs data from the National Single Window to build middleware offering banks automated, low-risk invoice financing and trade finance products for Cambodia's SMEs.
2. **Compliance-as-a-Service for SME Tax**: Develop API-first accounting tools that act as a simple interface to the GDT's CamInvoice systems, bundling automated invoice submission with basic bookkeeping for Cambodia's 43,970+ SMEs.
3. **Embedded Micro-Insurance**: Use KHQR payment flows as a distribution channel for insurance products, embedding micro-insurance offers directly into payment transactions with CamDigiKey identity verification for seamless enrollment.

## Use Cases

- **B2B Payment Automation**: Implemented automated payment gateway integrated with distributor ERP systems. Reduced processing time by 80% and improved cash flow.
- **Automated Tax Compliance**: Developed middleware connecting enterprise systems to the General Department of Taxation (GDT) API. Achieved 100% automated and accurate tax filing.
- **SME Lending Acceleration**: Deployed digital lending platform with automated credit scoring for microfinance institutions. Reduced loan approval time from weeks to days.

## Glossary — Cambodia FinTech Key Terms

- [Bakong](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/bakong): Cambodia's CBDC and real-time payment system operated by the National Bank of Cambodia.
- [CamDigiKey](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/camdigikey): Cambodia's national digital identity system enabling eKYC verification.
- [CamDX](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/camdx): National data exchange platform for government-private sector interoperability.
- [CamInvoice](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/caminvoice): Mandatory electronic invoicing system administered by the General Department of Taxation.
- [KHQR](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/khqr): Standardized QR code payment protocol for Cambodia's Bakong ecosystem.
- [Government-as-a-Platform (GaaP)](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/gaap): Cambodia's deliberate digital infrastructure architecture model.
- [National Bank of Cambodia (NBC)](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/nbc): Cambodia's central bank and operator of the Bakong payment system.
- [General Department of Taxation (GDT)](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/gdt): Tax authority administering CamInvoice and business registration.
- [Supply Chain Finance](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/supply-chain-finance): Invoice financing opportunity leveraging CamInvoice verified data.
- [Embedded Insurance](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary/embedded-insurance): Micro-insurance distributed through KHQR payment flows.
